name: Grafana
description: Connection definition for registering a Grafana instance as a first-class Meshery connection for dashboards and imports.

url.title: Grafana Endpoint
url.description: Base URL of the Grafana instance (e.g. http://grafana.example:3000).

name.title: Connection Name
name.description: Optional friendly name for this Grafana connection.

secret.title: API Key or Basic Auth
secret.description: API key, or basic-auth credential formatted as username:password, used to access Grafana.
